---
title: 'Swiftkey Prediction Model: Milestone Report'
author: "Chris Luchterhand"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Purpose

## Summary Statistics
text here

## Distribution of Word Frequency
text here

```{r words, echo=FALSE}
# code here
```

Unigrams, bigrams, trigrams

## Coverage Analysis
text here - 50%
text here - 90%

```{r coverage, echo=FALSE}
# code here
```

## Plan/Next Steps
